introSection: Aquila is a launched enclosed roller coaster currently under construction at Mandoria in Rzgów, Łódzkie, Poland.

sections.title: History

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is housed in a big tower attached to the park building.

fullText:
Aquila is a launched enclosed roller coaster currently under construction at Mandoria in Rzgów, Łódzkie, Poland.

Vertical construction began in the fall of 2024.

The ride is housed in a big tower attached to the park building.
